name: Lorelei
description:
This cool beauty who uses Ice-type Pokémon is one of the Elite Four. She likes cute things and has many plushies at home.

Full name: Lorelei Freezia

Age: 26

Height: 183 cm

Hobbies: Collecting plushies

Battle gimmicks: Dynamax and Z-Moves

Pokemon team: Lapras, Jynx, Cloyster, Dewgong, Slowbro, Alolan Sandslash
creator: Ice Pokémon Trainer
